verdict.label: Worth checking
verdict.headline: Almagreira Evening — 19:00
verdict.reason: Almagreira is worth a quick check for evening — 19:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  The wind should help keep it tidy.  The tide and timing are lining up well for this spot.

conversationalSummary.text: Almagreira at Evening — 19:00 looks like the best option, but it is still a check-first call. There is enough potential for a useful session, but the weak source agreement could spoil it. I'd check Surfline or MEO Beachcam before leaving.

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Almagreira looks like a clean small north coast window for Rare window, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 38 kJ, 8 s period, lully 14/100, and good wind at 20 km/h.  An exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal; this is best for small, clean north-coast days when protected spots look underpowered; 6-9s at low tide can still make exposed beaches like Belgas / Almagreira / Cerro / Meio da Baia punchy, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully.
best.shortExplanation: Almagreira is worth a quick check for evening — 19:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  The wind should help keep it tidy.  The tide and timing are lining up well for this spot.

ranked.explanation: Lagide looks like a small window for Fun progression, Medium confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 33 kJ, 9 s period, lully 12/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small; 6-9s at low tide is too shallow and dangerous over the reef shelves.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; 6-9s at low tide is too shallow and dangerous over the reef shelves.
ranked.shortExplanation: Lagide is worth a quick check for evening — 19:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  The wind should be manageable, but not a big advantage.  The tide makes the reef a bit less forgiving.
warnings: 6-9s at low tide is too shallow and dangerous over the reef shelves

ranked.explanation: Cerro looks like a clean small window for Too soft, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 38 kJ, 9 s period, lully 23/100, and good wind at 20 km/h.  A sheltered beachbreak with gentle lefts and rights, somewhat similar to Cantinho but less consistent; this is best for manageable bodyboard waves when north-northwest swell reaches the bay with clean southerly wind; 6-9s at low tide can still make exposed beaches like Belgas / Almagreira / Cerro / Meio da Baia punchy.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; Cerro looks below your bodyboard fun size; Cerro may feel too soft without more push.
ranked.shortExplanation: Cerro is worth a quick check for evening — 19:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  It looks too soft to make the drive worthwhile.  The wind should help keep it tidy.  The tide and timing are lining up well for this spot.
warnings: Cerro looks below your bodyboard fun size

ranked.explanation: Meio da Baia looks like a small window for Too soft, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 36 kJ, 9 s period, lully 22/100, and wind is not fully clear.  An inconsistent Baía spot that can work well when north-northwest swell reaches the bay; this is best for bodyboard sessions when the bay is clean, there is enough period and size, and the forecast shows a defined wave; 6-9s at low tide can still make exposed beaches like Belgas / Almagreira / Cerro / Meio da Baia punchy.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; Meio da Baia looks below your bodyboard fun size; Meio da Baia may feel too soft without more push.
ranked.shortExplanation: Meio da Baia is worth a quick check for evening — 19:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  It looks too soft to make the drive worthwhile.  The wind should be manageable, but not a big advantage.  The tide and timing are lining up well for this spot.
